message:
Remove unused imports from PromptGrid.test.tsx

Removed unused `waitFor` and `within` imports from @testing-library/react.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -36,14 +36,20 @@ jobs:
         run: bun install --frozen-lockfile
       - name: Web tests with coverage
         run: bun run test:coverage
-      - name: CLI tests
-        run: bun run test:cli
-      - name: Upload coverage report
+      - name: CLI tests with coverage
+        run: bun run test:cli:coverage
+      - name: Upload web coverage report
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
-          name: coverage-report
+          name: coverage-web
           path: apps/web/coverage/
           retention-days: 7
+      - name: Upload CLI coverage report
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: coverage-cli
+          path: coverage/cli/
+          retention-days: 7
 
   build:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest

@@ -14,7 +14,8 @@
     "build": "bun run --cwd apps/web build",
     "lint": "bun run --cwd apps/web lint",
     "test": "bun run --cwd apps/web test",
-    "test:cli": "bun test jfp.test.ts",
+    "test:cli": "bun test jfp.test.ts packages/core/__tests__ packages/cli/__tests__",
+    "test:cli:coverage": "bun test --coverage --coverage-reporter=text --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir=coverage/cli jfp.test.ts packages/core/__tests__ packages/cli/__tests__",
     "test:e2e:cli": "bun test e2e/cli-workflow.test.ts",
     "test:e2e:web": "bunx playwright test --config e2e/playwright.config.ts",
     "test:e2e:web:ui": "bunx playwright test --config e2e/playwright.config.ts --ui",
